items.prompt: Prevention for unpatched internet-facing systems should emphasize:
items.explain: Section 3.8.2 maps patching discipline to the Equifax failure mode.

items.prompt: Example 3.27 connects Yahoo's breach handling to:
choices: Enterprise valuation and governance during an acquisition
JSON nesting depth in housing listings
items.explain: Delayed disclosure coincided with reduced sale price and board accountability concerns.

items.prompt: A single security control is sufficient because Equifax, Yahoo, and Target failed the same way.
items.explain: Each incident failed at a different layer—patching, disclosure, or vendor access.

items.prompt: Vendor-mediated breach entry (Target) is addressed by:
choices: Vendor risk reviews and least-privilege third-party access
Publishing more aggregate telemetry without noise
items.explain: Supply-chain entry requires vendor oversight and segmentation, not only endpoint encryption.
